nodes.title: Research & UI/UX Design
nodes.rationale: Requires analyzing reference interfaces and producing a design spec for all following UI epics. Naturally performed by UI/UX design and research roles.

nodes.title: Sidebar Redesign with Project History & Conversation History
nodes.rationale: Builds the core layout and navigation sidebar. Requires the design specs from EPIC-001 to implement the tabs and history groupings.

nodes.title: Home Screen Redesign (Prompt-Centric Hub)
nodes.rationale: Implements the central workspace hub and command prompt. Needs the core layout from the sidebar epic and base design tokens/wireframes.

nodes.title: Enhance Existing Settings, MCP, and Channels Pages
nodes.rationale: Adds health indicators to existing pages. Can be done in parallel with other UI work once the initial UI/UX specs are finalized.

nodes.title: Project (Plan) Management Lifecycle
nodes.rationale: Builds the core plan CRUD APIs and integrates them with the sidebar and home screens for real-time progress visualization.

nodes.title: Real-Time Communication & Agent Interaction
nodes.rationale: Connects the command prompt to WebSocket streams and agents. Requires the home screen and plan executor structure to be fundamentally in place.

nodes.title: Theme System & Visual Polish
nodes.rationale: Applies animations, micro-interactions, and glassmorphism across the app. Requires the majority of the UI components to exist first.

nodes.title: Integration Testing & Documentation
nodes.rationale: Validates the complete end-to-end user flows, API integrations, and visual states. Requires all major features to be completed.

nodes.title: Long Memory (Persistent Knowledge Layer)
nodes.rationale: Builds backend memory extraction and embedding for completed plans. Requires real-time events and plan lifecycles to be finalized, though it doesn't block the UI layer.
